sn45.36:1.1: At Sāvatthī. "Bhikkhus, I will teach you asceticism and the goal of asceticism. Listen to that …
sn45.36:1.2: "And what, bhikkhus, is asceticism? It is this Noble Eightfold Path; that is, right view … right concentration. This is called asceticism.
sn45.36:1.3: "And what, bhikkhus, is the goal of asceticism? The destruction of lust, the destruction of hatred, the destruction of delusion. This is called the goal of asceticism."
